purpose: Glass with ice cubes at moment liquid pours in, creating crown of splash droplets.

tone_descriptor.description: Tone direction: contemplative, bold, warm, dignified, kinetic, etc.

prompt_template: Dynamic beverage photography of {beverage_descriptor} being poured from above into {glass_style} glass full of ice cubes, splash crown forming at rim with frozen droplets scattered 360 degrees, backlit {lighting_color} warm glow rim-lighting splash, additional ice scattered on dark wooden surface, condensation on glass exterior, dark moody gradient amber-to-black, frozen motion at 1/8000 shutter, shot on 50mm at f/4, no text, no hands {cultural_constraints_injection}
notes: Intents: launch, grow, harvest. Source code in research corpus: T04. Saudi adaptation guidance: Top Ramadan iftar content. Karak, qamar al-din, jellab, vimto pour shots. Vimto canonical Saudi Ramadan beverage; default to vimto-purple during Ramadan. Reference image: Optional. Recommended frequency: 2-3 per week.
